mapper.select: SELECT a.author_id AS authorId, a.name AS name, a.original_name AS originalName, a.country AS country, a.photo_url AS photoUrl, a.description AS description, rel.sort AS sort FROM author a INNER JOIN resource_author_rel rel ON a.author_id = rel.author_id WHERE rel.resource_id = #{resourceId} AND a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY rel.sort ASC

SELECT id, author_id AS authorId, name, original_name AS originalName, country, photo_url AS photoUrl, description, source_origin AS sourceOrigin, source_url AS sourceUrl, ctime, mtime, deleted FROM author WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM author
deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR country LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND source_origin = #{sourceOrigin}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO author ( author_id, name, original_name, country, photo_url, description, source_origin, source_url, ctime, mtime, deleted ) VALUES ( #{authorId}, #{name}, #{originalName}, #{country}, #{photoUrl}, #{description}, #{sourceOrigin}, #{sourceUrl}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE author
name = #{name}, original_name = #{originalName}, country = #{country}, photo_url = #{photoUrl}, description = #{description}, source_origin = #{sourceOrigin}, source_url = #{sourceUrl}, mtime = NOW()
WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rel.resource_id) FROM resource_author_rel rel INNER JOIN resource r ON rel.resource_id = r.resource_id WHERE rel.author_id = #{authorId} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT id, author_id AS authorId, name, original_name AS originalName, country, photo_url AS photoUrl, description, source_origin AS sourceOrigin, source_url AS sourceUrl, ctime, mtime, deleted FROM author WHERE deleted = 0 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR country LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY CASE WHEN name = #{keyword} THEN 1 WHEN name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, ctime DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
